description: Deterministic demo scenarios for portfolio metrics and the 3-minute demo path.

scenarios.title: Localhost proxy stale listener
scenarios.policy_expectation: PREVIEW; listener correlation is not writer proof

scenarios.title: DNS resolution failure
scenarios.policy_expectation: PREVIEW or BLOCK by confidence band

scenarios.title: HTTPS browser path failure
scenarios.policy_expectation: PREVIEW until proof or more evidence

scenarios.title: Remediation not sticky (proxy re-enable)
scenarios.notes: Use proxy-investigate + soak docs for sticky remediation narrative
scenarios.policy_expectation: BLOCK or PREVIEW on repeat execute without reverter stop

scenarios.title: Confirmed proxy bypass contrast
scenarios.policy_expectation: ALLOW for safe-tier only when proof CONFIRMED in live engine
